sentences.arabic: تُطْبَخُ شُورْبَةُ الْعَدَسِ كَثِيرًا فِي فَصْلِ الشِّتَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Čorba od leće se često kuha u zimskom periodu.
sentences.translationEn: Lentil soup is cooked a lot during the winter season.

sentences.arabic: نَضَعُ الْعَدَسَ مَعَ الْبَصَلِ وَالْجَزَرِ فِي قِدْرٍ كَبِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Stavljamo leću s lukom i mrkvom u veliku šerpu.
sentences.translationEn: We put lentils with onions and carrots in a large pot.

sentences.arabic: نُضِيفُ الْمَاءَ وَالْمِلْحَ وَالْكَمُّونَ ثُمَّ نَتْرُكُهَا عَلَى النَّارِ.
sentences.translation: Dodajemo vodu, so i kumin, a zatim je ostavljamo na vatri.
sentences.translationEn: We add water, salt, and cumin, then leave it on the fire.
